name: search_pins
description: Search the authenticated user's own pins matching a query string. Useful for finding previously saved pins by keyword or topic across all boards.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query string to match against pin titles and descriptions.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return per page (1-250).

parameters.name: bookmark
parameters.description: Cursor token for pagination to fetch the next page.

items.title: Beautiful Sunset Photography
items.description: Stunning sunset at the Pacific coast.
